headline: Is Nokia Stock a Smart Buy Ahead of Q2 Earnings Release?
summary: Nokia heads into Q2 earnings with AI networking advances, customer wins, and a broad 5G portfolio, but competition and telecom spending remain key watchpoints.

headline: Will Arista Networks (ANET) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?

headline: 3 Not-So-Obvious AI Stocks to Buy in July
summary: Everyone already owns NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Alphabet, but the real AI infrastructure buildout is quietly funneling billions into a different layer of the stack. Three under-the-radar names are converting that spending into hard revenue growth right now.

headline: 5 Stocks In The Spotlight Last Week:  Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In
summary: US stocks close lower, Dow falls 400 points. S&P 500 down 1.6%, Nasdaq down 2.9%. Analyst ratings can be unreliable, Benzinga's API offers curated data from top analysts for traders to use as trading indicators.
